title: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint - Reporting, Score, And Export APIs
applies_to: Exposure score, device secure score, and export-style reporting workflows

confirmed_facts.fact: The exposed APIs list includes score methods such as get exposure score and get device secure score.
Device secure score is retrieved through GET https://api.security.microsoft.com/api/configurationScore.
The device secure score API requires Score.Read.All for application access or Score.Read for delegated access.
The exposed APIs list includes export assessment per-device methods and properties, including export software vulnerabilities assessment and delta export software vulnerabilities assessment.
The exposed APIs list also includes export device health methods and properties.

implementation_notes: Use /api/machines for detailed current inventory counts and use score APIs when the report needs a summarized security posture metric instead of raw machine rows.
Use export-style APIs when the reporting workload is bulk assessment extraction rather than interactive entity lookup.
For dashboards, combine a live inventory metric such as onboarded device count with a summarized score metric such as configurationScore when the audience needs both coverage and posture.
caveats: Score and export endpoints have different permission names and response shapes from the machine inventory APIs.
The exposed APIs list is a routing index; implementation still needs the exact endpoint docs for any export method before coding.
Current score endpoints are current-state metrics, not full historical trend feeds.
